title: NavMap Component API
description: Complete API reference for the NavMap React component — props, types, and configuration.

sections.heading: NavMapProps
sections.content: The NavMap component accepts the following props for controlling graph display, view modes, theming, and toolbar visibility.

propsTable.name: graph
propsTable.description: Graph data object (pass this OR graphUrl)

propsTable.name: graphUrl
propsTable.description: URL to fetch graph JSON from

propsTable.name: screenshotBasePath
propsTable.description: Base path prepended to screenshot URLs

propsTable.name: analytics
propsTable.description: Analytics adapter for page view / transition data

propsTable.name: className
propsTable.description: Additional CSS class on the container

propsTable.name: style
propsTable.description: Additional inline styles on the container

propsTable.name: hideSearch
propsTable.description: Hide the search overlay (also disables Cmd+K shortcut)

propsTable.name: hideHelp
propsTable.description: Hide the help overlay (also disables ? shortcut)

propsTable.name: onValidationError
propsTable.description: Callback fired when graph validation fails
